BLAST Some weapons_ most notably explosives_ affect all the tar gets in a area around the point of impact: Such weapons are designated blast weapons in MW3. Weapons with blast radius use their full AP ad darage against targets within meter of the point of impact. Each additiona meter farther out from the point impact reduces the AP of the attack by minimum of 0) and the damage by die, until the damage dice are reduced to 0; targets beyond that range suffer no damage from the weapon_ Damage is rolled and resolved separately against all tar gets in the blast area. Also the Margin of Success is not added to the damage rolled for blast attacks_ Hlt Location: The damage from blast weapons is always con sidered splash damage for purposes of hit location see 121). In the case of burst-fire weapons that use power packs, such as pulse lasers each shot fired in the burst consumes the standard amount of power points_ The additional recoil generated by firing weapon burst mode adds TN modifier depending on the number of shots fired ad the recoil rating of the weapon: If the recoil rating apply +1 TN Modifier for every shot fired burst mode: recoil rating of means there is +1 Modifier for every shots fired (or fraction thereof)_ recoil rating of 3 adds +1 Modifier for every shots fired (or fraction thereof)_ and SO on.
